name: SMITH MICRO SOFTWARE, INC.
business: Smith Micro provides software solutions that simplify and enhance the mobile experience to leading wireless service providers. Its products include the SafePath family safety suite and CommSuite premium messaging platform. The company also previously offered ViewSpot retail display management, which was divested in June 2025.

exposures.sentence: by leveraging advanced technologies like artificial intelligence to enhance the features and capabilities of our solutions.
the consumer IoT market is creating a world where almost anything can be connected to the wireless Internet.
The SafePath product suite provides comprehensive and easy-to-use tools to protect family digital lifestyles and manage connected devices both inside and outside the home.

catalysts.sentence: On June 3, 2025, we divested our ViewSpot product for total consideration of $1.3 million, of which $1.0 million was paid on the closing date, with the remaining amounts collected on July 1, 2025 and October 1, 2025.

catalysts.event: Announcement of strategic cost reductions expected to save $7.2 million in 2026
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, in October 2025, we announced strategic cost reductions (in addition to those noted in the paragraph above) in our organization, primarily comprised of workforce reorganization, which we expect to result in cost savings of approximately $7.2 million reduction in costs for 2026.

catalysts.event: Lease renewal for corporate headquarters beginning May 1, 2026
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we executed a renewal on the lease whereby beginning May 1, 2026 we will lease approximately 9,571 square feet through April 30, 2031.
